source: R datasets::Titanic — 1912 Titanic sinking; comparison of Crew vs 3rd class survival stratified by sex
notes: Borderline control/paradox case: within each sex, Crew survival rate >= 3rd class. But pooled, 3rd class (25.2%) marginally exceeds Crew (24.0%) due to massive male overrepresentation in crew. A mild Simpson-style allocation distortion. Good contrast case for the corpus — the reversal direction is opposite to most classic paradoxes.
